description: Render external/cross-product nodes in the roadmap dependency graph so it can serve as the live cross-product dashboard (the surface that replaces foreign ROADMAP.md rows under COMP-ROADMAP-MIGRATE option C). Today the vision adapter drops external-prefixed nodes (lib/roadmap-graph/vision-adapter.js:85) — they're known-but-not-rendered. Add an opt-in mode that renders external/owned-elsewhere codes as reference nodes (resolving status read-only from the owning repo's feature.json), so forge-top's graph shows the full cross-product picture. Sibling of COMP-ROADMAP-GRAPH-2. Anchor: docs/plans/2026-06-21-roadmap-planning-model-design.md.
